gaps: No test covers the scenario of duplicate charging notifications when placing one earbud in an unplugged open charging case while wearing the other earbud.
No test covers charging notification behavior specific to True Wireless (TWS) earbuds where one earbud is in the case and the other is being worn.
No test covers the interaction between earbud placement in an unplugged (no cable) charging case and notification generation for TWS devices like Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC or Poly Voyager Free 20.

No test covers duplicate notification scenarios — all existing charging notification tests (65459826, 65459829, 65459840) assume a single charging event with a cable-connected headset, not the TWS case-based charging scenario.
No test covers the edge case of an open charging case (unplugged) triggering charging state transitions for individual earbuds.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CHRG-NOTIF-001: Single charging notification when placing left earbud in unplugged open case while wearing right earbud
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are fully charged and connected to phone via Bluetooth. Poly Studio Mobile app is installed and running in foreground. Phone notifications are enabled for the app.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] → verify both earbuds show 'Connected' status.
2. Remove both earbuds from the charging case and wear them. Verify both are connected.
3. Leave the charging case open and unplugged (no USB-C cable connected).
4. Remove the left earbud from your ear and place it into the left slot of the open charging case.
5. Observe the phone notification area for any charging notifications.
6. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → navigate to Device screen and observe the earbud status indicators.
7. Wait 10 seconds and observe if any duplicate or repeated notifications appear.
generated_testcases.expected: A single charging notification appears on the phone indicating the left earbud is charging. No duplicate or repeated notifications appear within 10 seconds. The Poly Studio Mobile app shows the left earbud status as 'Charging' and the right earbud status as 'Connected'. Only one notification is present in the notification tray.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CHRG-NOTIF-002: Single charging notification when placing right earbud in unplugged open case while wearing left earbud
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are fully charged and connected to phone via Bluetooth. Poly Studio Mobile app is installed and running in foreground.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] → verify both earbuds show 'Connected' status.
2. Remove both earbuds from the charging case and wear them. Verify both are connected.
3. Leave the charging case open and unplugged (no USB-C cable connected).
4. Remove the right earbud from your ear and place it into the right slot of the open charging case.
5. Observe the phone notification area for any charging notifications.
6. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → navigate to Device screen and observe the earbud status indicators.
7. Wait 10 seconds and observe if any duplicate or repeated notifications appear.
generated_testcases.expected: A single charging notification appears on the phone indicating the right earbud is charging. No duplicate or repeated notifications appear within 10 seconds. The Poly Studio Mobile app shows the right earbud status as 'Charging' and the left earbud status as 'Connected'. Only one notification is present in the notification tray.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CHRG-NOTIF-003: No duplicate notifications when rapidly placing and removing same earbud from unplugged open case
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected to phone. Poly Studio Mobile app is running. Charging case is open and unplugged.
1. Wear both earbuds. Verify both show 'Connected' in Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Remove the left earbud and place it into the left slot of the open charging case.
3. Wait for the charging notification to appear on the phone.
4. Immediately remove the left earbud from the case and place it back in your ear.
5. Wait 3 seconds, then remove the left earbud again and place it back into the left slot of the charging case.
6. Observe the notification area for the total number of charging notifications received.
7. Repeat steps 2-6 two more times (total of 3 cycles).
8. Count the total number of charging notifications in the notification tray.
generated_testcases.expected: Each time the left earbud is placed in the case, exactly one charging notification appears. No duplicate notifications are generated for a single placement event. After 3 cycles, exactly 3 charging notifications are present in the notification tray (one per placement). No notification is generated when the earbud is removed from the case.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CHRG-NOTIF-004: No charging notification when placing earbud in unplugged closed charging case
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected to phone. Poly Studio Mobile app is running. Charging case is unplugged.
1. Wear both earbuds. Verify both show 'Connected' in Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Close the charging case lid.
3. Remove the left earbud from your ear.
4. Open the charging case lid, place the left earbud into the left slot, and immediately close the lid.
5. Observe the phone notification area for 15 seconds.
6. Open the charging case lid and check if the left earbud LED indicates charging.
7. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and check the earbud status.
generated_testcases.expected: No charging notification appears on the phone when the earbud is placed in the case with the lid closed. The earbud may still charge (LED may indicate charging when lid is opened), but no notification is generated since the closed lid indicates the user is not actively managing the earbuds. When the lid is opened, the app may update the status to show the left earbud as 'Charging'.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CHRG-NOTIF-005: Single notification when placing second earbud in unplugged open case while first earbud is already charging
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected to phone. Poly Studio Mobile app is running. Charging case is open and unplugged.
1. Wear both earbuds. Verify both show 'Connected' in Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Remove the left earbud and place it into the left slot of the open charging case.
3. Observe a single charging notification for the left earbud.
4. Remove the right earbud from your ear and place it into the right slot of the open charging case.
5. Observe the phone notification area for any new notifications.
6. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and check the status of both earbuds.
7. Count the total number of charging-related notifications in the notification tray.
generated_testcases.expected: A single charging notification appears when the left earbud is placed in the case. When the right earbud is subsequently placed, a single additional charging notification appears (not a duplicate of the left earbud notification). Total of 2 charging notifications in the tray — one for each earbud. The Poly Studio Mobile app shows both earbuds as 'Charging'. No duplicate or repeated notifications for either earbud.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CHRG-NOTIF-006: No duplicate notifications when placing earbud in unplugged case during active phone call
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected to phone. Poly Studio Mobile app is running in background. Charging case is open and unplugged.
1. Wear both earbuds. Initiate a phone call from the phone and verify audio is routed through the earbuds.
2. During the active call, remove the left earbud and place it into the left slot of the open charging case.
3. Observe the phone notification area during the call for any charging notifications.
4. Continue the call for 30 seconds, monitoring for repeated or duplicate notifications.
5. End the call.
6. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] and check earbud status.
7. Check the notification tray for the total count of charging notifications.
generated_testcases.expected: A single charging notification appears when the left earbud is placed in the case, even during an active call. No duplicate or repeated notifications appear during the call. The notification does not interrupt the call audio. After the call ends, the notification tray contains exactly one charging notification. The Poly Studio Mobile app shows the left earbud as 'Charging' and the right earbud as 'Connected/In Call'.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CHRG-NOTIF-007: No duplicate notifications when placing earbud in unplugged case during media playback
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected to phone. Poly Studio Mobile app is running in background. Charging case is open and unplugged. Media app (e.g., Spotify, YouTube) is open.
1. Wear both earbuds. Start media playback (music or video) and verify audio is routed through the earbuds.
2. During active media playback, remove the right earbud and place it into the right slot of the open charging case.
3. Observe the phone notification area for any charging notifications during playback.
4. Continue playback for 30 seconds, monitoring for repeated or duplicate notifications.
5. Pause media playback.
6. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] and check earbud status.
7. Check the notification tray for the total count of charging notifications.
generated_testcases.expected: A single charging notification appears when the right earbud is placed in the case, even during active media playback. No duplicate or repeated notifications appear during playback. The notification does not interrupt or pause the media. The notification tray contains exactly one charging notification. The Poly Studio Mobile app shows the right earbud as 'Charging' and the left earbud as 'Connected'.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CHRG-NOTIF-008: No duplicate notifications when placing earbud in unplugged case with low battery on worn earbud
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected to phone. Poly Studio Mobile app is running. Charging case is open and unplugged. The right earbud battery is below 20% (low battery state).
1. Wear both earbuds. Verify the right earbud shows low battery warning in Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Remove the left earbud (which has sufficient charge) and place it into the left slot of the open charging case.
3. Observe the phone notification area for charging notifications.
4. Wait 10 seconds and check for duplicate notifications.
5. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and check the status of both earbuds.
6. Check the notification tray for the total count of charging notifications and any low battery notifications.
generated_testcases.expected: A single charging notification appears for the left earbud when placed in the case. No duplicate charging notifications appear. The low battery warning for the right earbud remains visible but does not cause duplicate charging notifications. The notification tray contains exactly one charging notification and the existing low battery notification. The Poly Studio Mobile app shows the left earbud as 'Charging' and the right earbud as 'Connected (Low Battery)'.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CHRG-NOTIF-009: No duplicate notifications when placing earbud in unplugged case — app force-kill and relaunch
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected to phone. Poly Studio Mobile app is running. Charging case is open and unplugged.
1. Wear both earbuds. Verify both show 'Connected' in Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Remove the left earbud and place it into the left slot of the open charging case.
3. Observe a single charging notification on the phone.
4. Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe it away from the recent apps list).
5. Wait 10 seconds and observe if any additional notifications appear.
6. Relaunch Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC].
7. Check the notification tray for the total count of charging notifications.
8. Remove the left earbud from the case and place it back in, then observe notifications.
generated_testcases.expected: After force-killing the app, no additional duplicate notifications appear. After relaunching the app, the notification tray still contains exactly one charging notification from the original placement. When the earbud is removed and re-placed, a single new charging notification appears (total of 2). The app correctly shows the left earbud status as 'Charging' after relaunch.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CHRG-NOTIF-010: No duplicate notifications when placing earbud in unplugged case — Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected to phone. Poly Studio Mobile app is running. Charging case is open and unplugged.
1. Wear both earbuds. Verify both show 'Connected' in Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Remove the left earbud and place it into the left slot of the open charging case.
3. Observe a single charging notification on the phone.
4. From the phone's Bluetooth settings, disconnect the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC.
5. Wait 5 seconds, then reconnect from the phone's Bluetooth settings.
6. Observe the notification area for any new or duplicate charging notifications.
7. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] and check earbud status.
8. Check the notification tray for the total count of charging notifications.
generated_testcases.expected: After Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect, no duplicate charging notifications appear. The notification tray still contains exactly one charging notification from the original placement. The Poly Studio Mobile app correctly shows the left earbud as 'Charging' and the right earbud as 'Connected' after reconnection. The Bluetooth state transition does not trigger a re-notification of the charging state.
